hooks.statusMessage: Lead Engineer reviewing changes before PR...

hooks.prompt:
A pull request was just created. Run: git diff main...HEAD --name-only to list all changed files on this branch. If ANY files are inside the `frontend/` or `mtga-companion/` directories, you must act as the ui-tester agent and run all frontend tests:
1. cd frontend && npm run test:run (Vitest component tests)
2. cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit (TypeScript type check)
3. cd frontend && npx playwright test (Playwright E2E tests)
Report pass/fail results for each. If no files changed inside frontend/ or mtga-companion/, do nothing and exit silently.

A pull request was just created. Run: git diff main...HEAD --name-only to list all changed files on this branch. If ANY files are outside both `frontend/` and `.github/` directories (i.e. backend services, .claude config, Go code, etc.), you must act as the lead-engineer agent and run the appropriate tests for those changed modules:
1. For any changed Go module directories: cd <module> && go vet ./... && go test -race ./...
2. Run gofumpt on any changed .go files
3. Flag any CLAUDE.md violations, missing tests, over-engineering, or scope creep
Report pass/fail results. If all changed files are only inside frontend/ or .github/, do nothing and exit silently.
